home.role: Senior Software Engineer | React & .NET | Building Scalable Web Applications
home.bio1: I am a Software Engineer with solid experience building scalable, secure, and high-performance applications using technologies such as React, .NET, TypeScript, Azure, and SQL Server. I work as a full-stack developer, turning ideas into reliable solutions with a focus on quality, maintainability, and continuous delivery.
home.bio2: I have implemented microservices-based architectures, improved build and deployment pipelines using Docker and Azure DevOps, and worked on enhancing the performance and stability of applications in business-critical environments.
home.bio3: I have been deepening my knowledge in Web3 and Blockchain, seeking to understand the fundamentals of decentralized technologies and their practical applications.
home.bio4: My work goes beyond code: I value teamwork, technical leadership, clear communication, and sharing best practices with the team.
home.bio5: Open to new connections, partnerships, and opportunities in innovative and challenging environments.
home.blogDesc: My blog for sharing knowledge and insights about technology.
